name: Mini Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 2 Loaves of Party Rye Bread (the little mini-bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the sausage if necessary.
2. Brown the sausage and hamburger in a large skillet.
3. Drain fat from the skillet.
4. Over low heat, melt Velveeta until thoroughly melted and stir well.
5. Spread a small spoonful of the mixture on each slice of Party Rye bread.
6. Place the prepared slices on a cookie sheet and freeze for at least 2 hours.
7. After freezing, remove from the cookie sheets and place in a freezer bag for up to 2 weeks.
8. To serve, place frozen "pizzas" on a cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes or until hot.
9. Serve immediately. Makes about 40.
